memory:memory/2026-04-29.md:1:21.snippet: # 2026-04-29 ## Durable session memory (payment audit + sandbox setup) - User shifted strategy from "full A–G in one pass" to **checkpointed execution** for reliability and visibility. - **Checkpoint 1** was completed as a repo/db inspection only (no live tests/no writes): mapped Stripe/payment routes, env vars, frontend callers, Supabase read/write tables, Stripe object usage, and domain classification. - Confirmed active Supabase test project switched to: - `gpaccxkfvcxzzpilsjww` (`https://gpaccxkfvcxzzpilsjww.supabase.co`) - Confirmed service-role access works on this project and required payment-related tables are present. - User explicitly requested strict operating rules for later

memory:memory/2026-02-13.md:1:8.snippet: # 2026-02-13 - User: Ben Brown confirmed. - Reinforced Nettmark patch protocol: always draft PLAN, require explicit `APPROVE <ticket>` before changes, use ops/patches queue. - Completed TICKET-001 plan + implementation (shared DashboardCard component, normalized affiliate dashboard cards). Patch stored in ops/patches/queue. - User wants UI consistency improvements first; backend integrity roadmap prepared for future work. - Reminder: cannot access Vercel runtime logs directly; need user-provided output or automation bridge.

memory:memory/2026-03-23.md:1:5.snippet: ## Home + onboarding work - Completed TICKET-022 (affiliate/business login topbars + light/dark parity) and pushed commits through TICKET-023C (business mobile header gap fixes and mobile pill slider restyle). - Planned and executed TICKET-025 redesign for home page: new hero, trust blocks, persona flows, product snapshots, pricing/ onboarding checklist, features, FAQ (ready to push). - Reviewed business onboarding + Stripe architecture: flagged security gaps (billing endpoints trust client IDs), redundant onboarding flag, and recommended unified ledger + single Connect account flow.

memory:memory/2026-04-29.md:16:24.snippet: - `wallet_refunds` table exists but current refund route behavior may center on `wallet_topups` updates, - business connect has both `create-account` and a disabled-style `create-business-account-link` path. - User asked about repeated "API out of credits" message; likely root cause explained as model/provider quota/billing rather than Stripe/Supabase token issues. ## User preference/process memory - User wants short, visible progress updates while long tasks run; lack of visible "typing" caused frustration. - User prefers concrete, staged checkpoint approvals before moving to next phase.

memory:memory/2026-02-19.md:1:8.snippet: # 2026-02-19 - Completed wallet UI visualization refresh (snapshot cards, timeline feed, collapsible ledger) plus follow-up removing Stripe connect CTA and aligning refundable balance with wallet balance. - Modernized affiliate dashboard with hero + quick actions, then Stage A polish (quick action chips, section labels, actionable empty states). - Shipped Manage Campaigns hero + KPI strip modernization and retained campaign list structure. - Confirmed repos: pushing to Affliya main affects affliya.com, not nettmark.com unless separate deployment target promoted. - Removed UGC estimator preset from ad submission wizard to avoid confusion; only DTC + Lead presets remain.
